mapper.select: SELECT * FROM education WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY start_year DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO education (user_id, school, degree, field_of_study, start_year, end_year) VALUES (#{userId}, #{school}, #{degree}, #{fieldOfStudy}, #{startYear}, #{endYear})
mapper.update: UPDATE education SET school = #{school}, degree = #{degree}, field_of_study = #{fieldOfStudy}, start_year = #{startYear}, end_year = #{endYear} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM education WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
